title: Best 6 5G NSA Management Platforms 2026: Network Operations Guide
description: Top 6 telecom management platforms for 2026: Compare platforms, pricing & features. Boost efficiency 25-40% for your business. Start optimizing today.
content:
5G NSA Non-Standalone Network Management: Complete Platform Comparison for 2026

5G NSA (non-standalone) is the transitional architecture that relies on 4G core networks for control. Managing NSA networks requires specialized platforms for core network management, access network management, and dual connectivity. We're reviewing the top 5G NSA management platforms to help operators choose the right solutions.

Understanding 5G NSA Architecture

5G NSA has specific characteristics: it relies on 4G core networks for control, uses dual connectivity (DC) to boost transmission through 4G and 5G connections, allows rapid deployment without building a 5G core, and cuts costs by using existing 4G facilities. Each factor shapes how you manage it.

Managing 5G NSA involves key tasks: managing 4G core network and 5G anchor, managing 4G and 5G base stations, managing dual connectivity configuration, and monitoring NSA network performance. Good platforms handle all of these together.

Top NSA Management Platforms

1. Nokia 5G NSA Management

Nokia's NSA management platform provides telecom-grade capabilities. It manages 4G core network and 5G anchor, manages 4G and 5G base stations, manages dual connectivity to coordinate 4G and 5G, and monitors NSA network performance.

Nokia NSA excels in dual connectivity management depth. Coordinated NSA dual connectivity manages both 4G and 5G connections. Core network management integrates everything. Access network management handles base stations. Performance monitoring measures precisely. Integration with Nokia NSA equipment ensures accuracy. Cloud management handles distributed NSA.

2. Ericsson 5G NSA Management

Ericsson's NSA management provides telecom capabilities. It manages 4G core network and 5G anchor, manages base stations, manages dual connectivity configuration, and monitors network performance.

Ericsson NSA's strength is NSA core network management depth. Integrated NSA core network management handles 4G and 5G anchors. Access network management manages base stations. Dual connectivity management coordinates connections. Performance monitoring measures performance. Integration with Ericsson NSA equipment guarantees accuracy. Cloud management supports remote NSA.

3. Huawei 5G NSA Management

Huawei's NSA management platform provides telecom capabilities. It manages 4G core network and 5G anchor, manages base stations, manages dual connectivity, and monitors performance. It's adapted for domestic operator requirements.

Huawei NSA stands out with localization support. Deep adaptation to domestic operators' 5G NSA management processes and regulations. Flexible customization lets operators adjust functions. Strong technical support provides local services. Integration with Huawei NSA equipment ensures accuracy. AI NSA management reduces manual work.

4. ZTE 5G NSA Management

ZTE's NSA management provides telecom capabilities. It manages 4G core network and 5G anchor, manages base stations, manages dual connectivity configuration, and monitors network performance.

ZTE NSA's advantage is cost-effectiveness. Compared to international brands, it offers more competitive pricing. Core network management handles core network. Access network management manages base stations. Dual connectivity management coordinates connections. Performance monitoring measures performance. Localization support meets domestic operator requirements.

Amdocs NSAIntegrated ManagementBase Station ManagementDual Connectivity ManagementPrecise MonitoringFull Coverage

What's Coming in 2026

5G NSA management is moving toward SA migration, automation, and integrated management. SA migration gradually transitions to SA architecture for end-to-end 5G capabilities. Automated NSA management cuts manual work and boosts efficiency. Integrated management handles 4G and 5G together, simplifying operations.

NSA to SA migration will be a priority. Tools need to support smooth migration to SA architecture, cutting migration costs. NSA automation creates a complete loop of core network management, access network management, dual connectivity management, and performance monitoring. NSA integration manages 4G and 5G networks together.

2026 is a critical year for 5G NSA to SA migration. Mature SA technology brings complete 5G capabilities. Automation reduces manual workload. Integrated management simplifies operations. Operators should choose NSA management platforms supporting SA migration, automated management, and integrated management.
author: Telecom Expert

acceptedAnswer.text: 5G NSA Management Platforms involves managing and monitoring network infrastructure components to ensure optimal performance, reliability, and efficiency in telecommunications operations.

mainEntity.name: What are the key features of 5G NSA Management Platforms tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key features include real-time monitoring, automated configuration management, performance optimization, fault detection and diagnosis, and comprehensive reporting dashboards.

mainEntity.name: How do 5G NSA Management Platforms tools improve network efficiency?

acceptedAnswer.text: These tools improve efficiency by automating routine operations, providing AI-driven optimization suggestions, reducing manual intervention by up to 40%, and enabling proactive issue prevention.

mainEntity.name: What are the best 5G NSA Management Platforms tools in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Top tools include vendor-specific solutions from Nokia, Ericsson, and Huawei, as well as universal platforms from Oracle and Amdocs, each offering different levels of AI integration and automation.

mainEntity.name: How much does 5G NSA Management Platforms software cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary based on network size and vendor, typically ranging from enterprise licensing models to subscription-based cloud solutions. Contact vendors for customized pricing.

mainEntity.name: Can 5G NSA Management Platforms tools handle multi-vendor environments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, universal management tools like Oracle and Amdocs support standard interfaces for multi-vendor environments, while vendor-specific tools offer deeper integration with their own equipment.

howto_schema.name: How to Implement 5G NSA Management Platforms
howto_schema.description: Step-by-step guide for implementing 5G NSA Management Platforms in telecommunications networks

step.name: Assess Your Network Infrastructure
step.text: Evaluate current network architecture, identify key elements requiring management, and document operational challenges and efficiency goals.

step.name: Select Appropriate Management Tool
step.text: Compare vendor-specific vs universal tools, evaluate AI capabilities and automation features, and choose based on your network ecosystem and requirements.

step.name: Deploy and Configure the System
step.text: Install management software, configure network element connections, set up monitoring parameters, and establish automation rules.

step.name: Integrate with Existing Operations
step.text: Connect with current operational systems, establish data flows, configure reporting dashboards, and train operations team on new tools.
